    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    P

    Plane - Class in geometries.impl
    Class Plane represents a plane in 3D space.
    Plane(Point, Point, Point) - Constructor for class geometries.impl.Plane
    Constructor using three points on the plane.
    Plane(Point, Vector) - Constructor for class geometries.impl.Plane
    Constructor using a point and a normal vector.
    Point - Class in primitives
    Class Point represents a point in 3D Cartesian coordinates.
    Point(double, double, double) - Constructor for class primitives.Point
    Constructor to initialize point with three coordinate values.
    Point(Double3) - Constructor for class primitives.Point
    Constructor to initialize point with Double3 object.
    Polygon - Class in geometries.impl
    Represents a convex polygon in a 3D Cartesian coordinate system.
    Polygon(Point...) - Constructor for class geometries.impl.Polygon
    Constructs a convex polygon from ordered vertices.
    primitives - package primitives
     
    product(Double3) - Method in record class primitives.Double3
    Multiplies this triad with another triad component-wise.
